positive: A detailed watercolor illustration of exotic tropical flora and fauna, featuring vibrant monstera leaves, hibiscus flowers, and delicate gold accents. Style should be highly aesthetic, bohemian, and suitable for a patch design. Soft edges, natural color palette, botanical drawing, engraved style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, grayscale
